create_form.members_hint: People from your other workspaces get access immediately — no invitation step.

errors.slug_format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
errors.slug_taken: That workspace URL is already taken.
errors.slug_reserved: That workspace URL is reserved and cannot be used.

new_page.title: Welcome to Multica
new_page.description: One workspace where you and your AI teammates work side by side — taking issues, leaving comments, sharing the same context.
new_page.invite_hint: Add teammates from your other workspaces when you create it.

creation_disabled.title: Workspace creation is disabled
creation_disabled.description: This Multica instance does not allow new workspaces to be created. Ask your administrator for an invitation to an existing workspace.

no_access.title: Workspace not available
no_access.description: This workspace doesn't exist or you don't have access.
no_access.sign_in_different: Sign in as a different user
